title: Conflict fault baseline scenario
description: Deterministic scenario skeleton for a representative context-conflict case where multiple bounded candidates may remain simultaneously admissible. This file is an integration asset and must remain aligned with frozen assets under common/.

steps.description: Publish a conflict-specific fixture intended to preserve multiple bounded candidate interpretations simultaneously through the registry-aligned operational context input plane.
Observe the verification-safe audit stream and capture the conservative conflict-handling outcome.

notes: The exact conflict predicate must be derived dynamically from frozen policy and validator constraints rather than hardcoded here.
This skeleton is intended to exercise conservative resolution under ambiguity.
This scenario now uses a conflict-specific fixture instead of a generic Class 1 fixture.
Class 1 autonomous execution must remain limited to the frozen low-risk lighting catalog when conflict is resolved safely.
